nodes.note: Customer master record from mainframe VSAM file
Customer change event — published to Kafka topic customer.changes
CUSTOMER table — SQL Server 2008. No app-level validation until 2018.
EDI 856 Despatch Advice — Fixed Length Format
Enriched order events from the streaming platform (Kafka → S3)
Customer master — CRM system of record
Curated completed-orders fact table — one row per order
Curated order line facts — one row per non-cancelled line item

CRM system of record for customer identity. Subject to GDPR and CCPA.
        Retention is 7 years after account closure; active accounts are exempt.
        Retention clock starts when account_closure_date is populated.

General ledger transactions. Subject to SOX Section 802 (10-year retention)
        and GDPR (customer-linked fields). Custom tokens: cost_center maps to internal
        cost allocation; audit_level drives SOX audit sampling rates.

Unified customer view combining CRM profiles and financial activity.
        Inherits the strictest governance posture from both sources:
        GDPR + CCPA from CRM, SOX from Finance. Retention is 7 years
        after last activity (the shorter of the two source policies).
        Retention clock anchored to last_activity_date.
Commerce REST API v2 order response
Salesforce User object — minimal for ref resolution
Salesforce Account object — minimal for ref resolution
Sourced from OpenExchangeRates API. Updated daily at 00:01 UTC.
CRM deletion feed — daily list of deactivated customers
Product information management system — full catalog export
Customer dimension — upsert and soft delete target
Immutable purchase event log — append only
Web/app checkout sessions for abandonment tracking
Order transactions from the e-commerce order service
Support tickets from the helpdesk platform REST API
DIM_CUSTOMER_360 — unified customer view in Snowflake analytics warehouse
CRM deal pipeline — hourly API pull
Deal fact table — grain: one row per deal
Revenue fact — grain: one row per invoice line
Executive weekly sales overview — filters default to current quarter
Binary classifier predicting 90-day churn. Retrained weekly; promoted to production only if AUC > 0.82.
Operational risk dashboard — restricted to risk-ops team
Simple daily order count and total — emailed to warehouse team each morning
Logical SAP ERP purchase order contract
Logical Oracle MFCS purchase order ingestion contract

edges.nl_text: "updated"
"Emit the distinct @event_type values as a JSON array string."

"""
     If @CUST_TYPE = "R", trim and concatenate @PERSONAL_NAME.FIRST_NAME + " " + @PERSONAL_NAME.LAST_NAME.
     If @CUST_TYPE = "B", use @BUSINESS_NAME.COMPANY_NAME trimmed.
     This resolves the REDEFINES: PERSONAL_NAME vs BUSINESS_NAME.
     """

"""
     If @CUST_TYPE = "R", trim and concatenate @PERSONAL_NAME.FIRST_NAME + " " + @PERSONAL_NAME.LAST_NAME.
     If @CUST_TYPE = "B", use @BUSINESS_NAME.COMPANY_NAME trimmed.
     This resolves the REDEFINES: PERSONAL_NAME vs BUSINESS_NAME.
     """

"""
     If @CUST_TYPE = "R", trim and concatenate @PERSONAL_NAME.FIRST_NAME + " " + @PERSONAL_NAME.LAST_NAME.
     If @CUST_TYPE = "B", use @BUSINESS_NAME.COMPANY_NAME trimmed.
     This resolves the REDEFINES: PERSONAL_NAME vs BUSINESS_NAME.
     """

"""
     If @CUST_TYPE = "R", trim and concatenate @PERSONAL_NAME.FIRST_NAME + " " + @PERSONAL_NAME.LAST_NAME.
     If @CUST_TYPE = "B", use @BUSINESS_NAME.COMPANY_NAME trimmed.
     This resolves the REDEFINES: PERSONAL_NAME vs BUSINESS_NAME.
     """

"If @CUST_TYPE is null or R, trim and concat @FIRST_NM + ' ' + @LAST_NM.
     Otherwise, trim @COMPANY_NM."
"Format as @city, @state @zip"
"Format as @city, @state @zip"
"Format as @city, @state @zip"
"US"

"Extract digits. If 10 digits assume US +1. Format as E.164.
         If unparseable, set null and log warning."
"Concatenate with space separator"
"Concatenate with space separator"
"Format as @email (@phone)"
"Format as @email (@phone)"
"Latest @email from @vault::sat_contact_details satellite"

"Extract all digits. If 11 digits starting with 1, treat as US.
     If 10 digits, assume US country code +1. Format as E.164.
     For other patterns, attempt to determine country from @COUNTRY_CD."

"Create a record in the addresses table using @ADDR_LINE_1, @ADDR_LINE_2,
     @CITY, @STATE_PROV, @ZIP_POSTAL, @COUNTRY_CD. Normalize @STATE_PROV to
     2-char code (handle full names). Deduplicate against existing addresses
     by normalized street + zip. Return the UUID of the new or existing record."
"If null, fall back to CREATED_DATE parsed as MM/DD/YYYY in UTC"
"Filter profanity using corporate word list v3.2, replacing matches with asterisks"

"Parse using sibling field @DATEFMT: if 102 parse as CCYYMMDD,
     if 203 parse as CCYYMMDDHHMM. Output format: YYYY-MM-DD."

"Extract PO number from @REFNUM (digits before /).
     Look up the PO in MFCS to determine the delivery location."
"Validate supplier exists in MFCS PO table."

"Resolve SAP vendor number to MFCS supplier id using the approved
       supplier cross-reference. Reject the document if no active MFCS
       supplier exists for the vendor."

"Required by MFCS schema but no source data available in EDI 856.
     Options under discussion:
     1. Populate with a single placeholder container per order
     2. Request EDI 856 extension from suppliers
     3. Derive from warehouse receiving logic
     Blocked on: MFCS-2847"

"Retrieve MFCS item number using the supplier's traded code
         from the MFCS supplier item cross-reference."

"Translate SAP material number to the MFCS item identifier using the
         supplier-item or material cross-reference. Reject the line if no
         active MFCS item can be resolved."

"Divide by 10000 to account for 4 implied decimal places.
       Then multiply by PO pack size from MFCS (Action A-504).
       Pack size retrieved from MFCS PO line matching this item."
"Calculate: amount + tax - discount"
"Calculate: amount + tax - discount"
"Calculate: amount + tax - discount"
"Count elements in line_items (already filtered to exclude cancelled items at source)"
"Multiply line_items.unit_price by line_items.quantity, then add line_items.tax_amount"
"quantity * unit_price"

"Count distinct values in line_items.discount_lines.discount_code
     where @discount_type = promo"

"For each event, multiply @unit_price by @quantity,
     sum within the event, then sum across the session group."

"Concatenate @crm_customers.first_name and @crm_customers.last_name with a
     single space separator. Trim whitespace. Null if both components are null."

"Concat @crm_customers.first_name + ' ' + @crm_customers.last_name.
     Trim whitespace. If both are null, use @company_name instead."
"Concatenate @first_name and @last_name from @vault::sat_contact_details"

"Sum of @finance_transactions.amount where @customer_id matches,
     rounded to 2 decimal places. Null if no transactions."
"Count of @finance_transactions rows for this customer. Zero if no transactions."
"Count transactions where @status = completed, per customer."
"Max of @finance_transactions.transaction_date for this customer. Null if none."
"Max transaction timestamp where @status = completed, per customer."

"Parse ISO-8601 timestamp from the API. The created_at field is
     always UTC with a Z suffix. Output UTC timestamp."

"Parse either ISO-8601 with timezone or local store time in
     America/New_York depending on channel. Output UTC timestamp."
"Convert to USD using currency field and daily FX rate"

"Collect @DiscountCode values from the order discount entries, preserving source order.
     Emit as a JSON array string. If no discounts, emit []."

"Collect `DiscountCode` values from the order discount entries, preserving source order.
     Emit as a JSON array string. If no discounts, emit []."

"Sum @DiscountAmount across the order discount entries for the current order.
     If no discounts, emit 0.00."

"Sum @DiscountAmount across the order discount entries for the current order.
     If no discounts, emit 0.00."
"Count entries in @LineItems for the current order."
"Count @LineNumber entries for the current order."
"Truncate to UTC calendar date YYYY-MM-DD."
"Truncate to UTC calendar date YYYY-MM-DD."
"Truncate to UTC calendar date YYYY-MM-DD."
"Truncate to UTC calendar date YYYY-MM-DD."
"True if no termination record exists in HR system"
"Construct ISO-8601 date from year, month, day components"
"Construct ISO-8601 date from year, month, day components"
"Construct ISO-8601 date from year, month, day components"

"Sum all transactions where @status = completed, grouped by @customer_email.
     Join to @crm_system on @email to resolve @customer_id."
"Sum of @amount grouped by @department and @fiscal_year"
"Set to loyalty_update if @loyalty_points > 1000, otherwise null."

"Check @payment_gateway: if any transaction has @payment_gateway.status = failed for
     this customer, set high. Otherwise low."
"Format as Transaction {@transaction_id} completed successfully."

"Resolve the business receiving site to an MFCS location id.
       If no direct mapping exists, fall back to a plant-to-location mapping
       approved by merchandising operations."
"True if @stock_level < 10, false otherwise."

"Calculate months between @crm_customers.signup_date and current_date.
     Round down to nearest whole month."
"Count of @order_transactions where @status = completed."
"Sum @order_transactions.total where @status = completed."
"Sum abs(@order_transactions.total) where @status = refunded."
"@total_revenue minus @total_refunds."
"@total_revenue divided by @total_orders. Null if @total_orders = 0."
"Min @order_transactions.order_date where @status = completed."
"Max @order_transactions.order_date where @status = completed."

"Mode of @order_transactions.channel where @status = completed.
     If tied, prefer in order: web > mobile > api > pos.
     Null if no orders."
"Count distinct non-null @order_transactions.coupon_code."
"Count of @support_tickets (already filtered to last 12 months)."
"Count of @support_tickets where @status IN (open, in_progress)."

"Average hours between @support_tickets.created_at and @resolved_at
     where @resolved_at is not null. Null if no resolved tickets."

"Average @support_tickets.csat_score where @csat_score is not null.
     Null if no ratings."

"True if any @support_tickets.priority = critical and
     @status IN (open, in_progress). False otherwise."

"""
    Derive customer health based on multiple signals:
    - **healthy**: is_active = true AND (last_order_date within 90 days
      OR annual_contract_value > 0) AND open_tickets < 3
      AND avg_csat_score >= 3.5
    - **churning**: is_active = false OR last_order_date > 180 days ago
      (and no active contract)
    - **at_risk**: everything else — particularly customers with
      high open ticket counts, critical tickets, or declining CSAT
    """
"Lookup @department from @source::hr_employees using @posted_by -> @employee_id"
"Lookup @full_name from @source::hr_employees using @posted_by -> @employee_id"
"Extract year from @entry_date"
"Lookup from @source::finance_budgets matching @department and @fiscal_year"
"@budget_amount minus @actual_spend"
"@variance divided by @budget_amount times 100"
"Count distinct employees from @staging::stg_employees for this @department"
"MD5 hash of @first_name, @last_name, @email, @phone, @company_name for change detection"
"MD5 hash of @contact_id + @deal_id"
"Surrogate key via sequence generator"
"Lookup via @vault::link_contact_deal -> @vault::hub_contact -> @dim_contact"
"Join @erp_invoices.customer_code to CRM contact via lookup table"
"Latest @company_name from @vault::sat_contact_details satellite"
"Surrogate key via sequence generator"
"From a future deal satellite if it existed — placeholder for future extension"
"Convert deal amount to USD using daily FX rate"
"Multiply by rate from @fx_spot_rates lookup using CurrencyIsoCode"
"True if @stage = closed_won"
"Difference in days between deal created date and close date"
"Surrogate key via sequence generator"
"Parse the minimum timestamp in the group as UTC."
"Parse the maximum timestamp in the group as UTC."
"Count records in the group where @event_type == product_view."
"Count records in the group where @event_type == add_to_cart."
"Count records in the group where @event_type == purchase."
"Sum @discount_amt across all cart line elements in all events in the group."
"Count distinct @sku values across all events in the session."

"Find the most frequent CartLines.category across the session.
     Break ties by highest gross merchandise value."

transforms:
map {
      NB: "standard"
      UB: "transfer"
      FO: "framework"
      ZST: "stock"
      default: "standard"
    }

edges.nl_text:
"Take the earliest non-null requested delivery date across all lines.
     If all line dates are null, fall back to @BEDAT."

"If @MEINS represents supplier packs or cases, convert to the target
       stocking quantity using the MFCS supplier-item pack configuration.
       Otherwise preserve the numeric quantity. Round to 4 decimal places."

"If @PEINH is greater than 1, divide @NETPR by @PEINH to derive the
       per-unit cost in document currency. Round to 4 decimal places."

"Map SAP UOM values to the MFCS UOM vocabulary. Escalate any value
         that cannot be resolved through the approved conversion table."
"Use @ARR_Override__c if not null, otherwise fall back to @Amount"

transforms:
map {
      Prospecting: "top_funnel"
      Qualification: "mid_funnel"
      "Value Prop": "mid_funnel"
      Closed_Won: "closed_won"
      Closed_Lost: "closed_lost"
      _: "unknown"
    }

edges.nl_text: "True if @StageName is Closed_Won or Closed_Lost, false otherwise."

warnings.text: plaintext in legacy — SSN or EIN
DATA GAP: containers required but no source data
stored as string, must cast to UUID
ASSUMPTION: header ReceivingSite is authoritative for target location
